video_job.actor_prompt: Cinematic wide shot in a warm wood Japanese fantasy RPG guild hall. Eri Ashbell, an androgynous adventurer in reinforced leather armor and a bright scarf, stands before Eri Silverbrook, a masculine guild coordinator in a formal cloak. Ashbell presents a sealed quest parcel with both hands toward Silverbrook. Lively guild background, soft warm lighting, high detail, no text, no watermark.
video_job.target_continuation_prompt: Same continuous shot in the Japanese fantasy RPG guild hall. Eri Silverbrook, the masculine guild coordinator, accepts the sealed quest parcel from Eri Ashbell. Both characters perform a slight, respectful bow to complete the handoff. Consistent character appearance, warm anime RPG lighting, no text, no watermark.
video_job.safety_notes: The interaction is a professional, non-sexual quest handoff between two characters in a fantasy setting, adhering to safety guidelines regarding respectful and non-explicit content.

timeline_story.story_verb: completed a visible quest handoff with
timeline_story.selection_reason: Completing the handoff of goblin boss loot and raid reports after the successful raid.

relationship_adjustments.reason: Successful mission handoff builds professional trust.
Reliable reporting facilitates smooth guild operations.
